title: The Future of User Interfaces III
body: Microsoft returns with a new futuristic video following the same idea as the [published last year](http://www.xarop.com/el-futuro-de-los-interfaces-de-usuario-2/ "The Future of User Interfaces II") and the [previous one](http://www.xarop.com/el-futuro-de-los-interfaces-de-usuario/ "The Future of User Interfaces"). Only a year has passed, but we see that mobility and geolocation are fundamental points to consider in this future that we already have here. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a6cNdhOKwi0
